nuggets.headline: the artist Xmane is featured on every track of Pete Rango's 'Savage Planet' EP
nuggets.text: You're hearing one of three tracks Pete Rango created for the 2022 EP *Savage Planet*. The entire project is a collaboration with the artist Xmane, who is featured on this song, "Oms at Play," as well as "Traag Park" and "Planet X."

source.title: Download Pete Rango album songs: Savage Planet | Boomplay Music
source.quoteSnippet: Savage Planet has 3 songs sung by Pete Rango... 1. Oms at Play ft. Xmane / 2. Traag Park ft. Xmane / 3. Planet X ft. Xmane

nuggets.imageCaption: Producer and artist developer Pete Rango at work in the studio.

nuggets.headline: Pete Rango learned production to record his high school metal band
nuggets.text: Before developing his electronic and hip-hop sound, Rango was in a metal/hardcore band called In Alcatraz 1962. His desire to record, mix, and produce his own band's records was the catalyst that launched his entire production career, years before he would begin working in other genres.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: When I was in high school, I started a metal/hardcore band called In Alcatraz 1962, and that became the catalyst for me wanting to learn how to record/mix/produce our own records.

nuggets.imageCaption: Oms at Play by Pete Rango

nuggets.headline: hear Pete Rango's production work with Jesse Boykins III
nuggets.text: After winning a producer competition in Miami, Rango and his production partner Parris Pierce landed a placement on Jesse Boykins III's 2016 EP, *Bartholomew WAVE I*. It was an early career break that put him in the same sessions as collaborators like Hudson Mohawke and Abjo.

source.title: Meet Pete Rango - Voyage MIA Magazine | Miami City Guide
source.quoteSnippet: That’s when we ended up landing a song on Jesse Boykins III EP Bartholomew WAVE I with Hudson Mowhake and Abjo.

nuggets.imageCaption: Experimental R&B artist Jesse Boykins III has collaborated with Pete Rango.

artistSummary: Born in Bogota, Colombia, Pete Rango's musical journey began in metal/hardcore bands before pivoting to electronic and hip-hop production. He is a producer, creative director, and artist developer who has landed sync placements on HBO and founded the non-profit L.I.V. (Life Is Valuable).
